# Justified Technical Solutions — https://www.justifiedtechnical.ae

> Equipment rental and repair in Abu Dhabi, UAE since 2013.

## Services
- Soundproof diesel generator rental (5 kVA – 1500 kVA)
- Air compressors (150–950 CFM)
- Tower lights, diesel tanks, load banks
- Distribution boards, ATS, synchronizing panels
- Cables, industrial welding machines
- Maintenance and 24/7 support
